name: Scene Breakdown
description: Evaluates the quality of scene decomposition from the scene breakdown phase.

dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.criteria: Does the scene breakdown cover the entire story? Are all narrative beats represented as scenes?

scoringGuide.excellent: Every narrative beat from the story is represented. No gaps in the visual storytelling.
scoringGuide.good: Most of the story is covered. Minor beats might be condensed but nothing critical is lost.
scoringGuide.adequate: Core story covered but several moments skipped or compressed.
scoringGuide.poor: Significant portions of the story are missing from the scene breakdown.

dimensions.name: scene_granularity
dimensions.criteria: Are scenes appropriately granular? Not too few (losing detail) or too many (fragmented)?

scoringGuide.excellent: Scene count is well-calibrated. Each scene represents a distinct visual moment with clear purpose.
scoringGuide.good: Mostly appropriate granularity. A few scenes could be split or merged.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some scenes too broad or too narrow. Uneven granularity.
scoringGuide.poor: Either too few scenes (story compressed) or too many (fragmented narrative).

dimensions.name: visual_clarity
dimensions.criteria: Is each scene described with enough visual detail to generate an image? Are camera angles, compositions, and key visual elements specified?

scoringGuide.excellent: Each scene has a clear visual description including composition, key actions, and atmosphere.
scoringGuide.good: Good visual descriptions for most scenes. Some lack specific composition details.
scoringGuide.adequate: Basic scene descriptions that give a general idea but lack visual specificity.
scoringGuide.poor: Scene descriptions are too vague to guide image generation.

dimensions.name: narrative_flow
dimensions.criteria: Do scenes flow naturally from one to the next? Is there visual continuity?

scoringGuide.excellent: Scenes flow seamlessly. Clear visual continuity with natural transitions.
scoringGuide.good: Good flow overall. Most transitions are smooth.
scoringGuide.poor: Scenes feel disconnected. No visual continuity.
